title: Smoothly Refined
description: This makes Minecraft feel more alive while also optimising your game with NO GAME MECHANICS COMPROMISED
body:
**The modpack provides great performance and better aspect to the game without compromising any game mechanics**

**Why you should use the modpack?**
- it provides great performance
- it provides a trailer-like aspect
- it provides great quality of life features _(socials, world hosting, zoom, etc.)_
- it provides overhauled animations for players, mobs, and every interaction _(menus, eating, throwing, etc.)_
- it includes BSL Shaders pre-configured to match the official trailer look

**If you want to see some in-game screenshots check the gallery** _(BTW this is not a shader, it's a resource pack and it doesn't affect the game performance)_

![mountain view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f637d7fb4f923f84392198921f2e85415d25d972.png)
